'''竏嗾h-ch-t''' ('''kathachat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:qualitate|qualitate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-ch-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qualitate|qualitate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗾h-ch-t
|-
! Lemma
| kathachat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithachat|thithachat]] || [[word:jithachat|jithachat]] || [[word:shithachat|shithachat]] || [[word:kithachat|kithachat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthachat|thuthuthachat]] || [[word:jujuthachat|jujuthachat]] || [[word:shushuthachat|shushuthachat]] || [[word:kukuthachat|kukuthachat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthachat|thuthachat]] || [[word:juthachat|juthachat]] || [[word:shuthachat|shuthachat]] || [[word:kuthachat|kuthachat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthachat|thuthachat]] || [[word:juthachat|juthachat]] || [[word:shuthachat|shuthachat]] || [[word:kuthachat|kuthachat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethachat|thethachat]] || [[word:jethachat|jethachat]] || [[word:shethachat|shethachat]] || [[word:kethachat|kethachat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothachat|thothothachat]] || [[word:jojothachat|jojothachat]] || [[word:shoshothachat|shoshothachat]] || [[word:kokothachat|kokothachat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothachat|thothachat]] || [[word:jothachat|jothachat]] || [[word:shothachat|shothachat]] || [[word:kothachat|kothachat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothachat|thothachat]] || [[word:jothachat|jothachat]] || [[word:shothachat|shothachat]] || [[word:kothachat|kothachat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦthachat|thﾃｦthachat]] || [[word:jﾃｦthachat|jﾃｦthachat]] || [[word:shﾃｦthachat|shﾃｦthachat]] || [[word:kﾃｦthachat|kﾃｦthachat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathachat|thathathachat]] || [[word:jajathachat|jajathachat]] || [[word:shashathachat|shashathachat]] || [[word:kakathachat|kakathachat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathachat|thathachat]] || [[word:jathachat|jathachat]] || [[word:shathachat|shathachat]] || [[word:kathachat|kathachat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathachat|thathachat]] || [[word:jathachat|jathachat]] || [[word:shathachat|shathachat]] || [[word:kathachat|kathachat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathachat|shathachat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathachat|goshathachat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathachat|gokishathachat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathachatnﾃｼ|shathachatnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathachatnknﾃｼ|goshathachatnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathachatnﾃｼ|gokishathachatnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathachatshﾃｫ|shathachatshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathachatnkshﾃｫ|goshathachatnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathachatshﾃｫ|gokishathachatshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathachatro|shathachatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathachatnkro|goshathachatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathachatro|gokishathachatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathachatmu|shathachatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathachatnkmu|goshathachatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathachatmu|gokishathachatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathachatsher|shathachatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathachatnksher|goshathachatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathachatsher|gokishathachatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathachatng|shathachatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathachatnkng|goshathachatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathachatng|gokishathachatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathachatya|shathachatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathachatnkya|goshathachatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathachatya|gokishathachatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathachatyam|shathachatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathachatnkyam|goshathachatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathachatyam|gokishathachatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathachatnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shathachatnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathachatnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshathachatnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathachatnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishathachatnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathachatnﾃｼro|shathachatnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathachatnknﾃｼro|goshathachatnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathachatnﾃｼro|gokishathachatnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathachatnﾃｼmu|shathachatnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathachatnknﾃｼmu|goshathachatnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathachatnﾃｼmu|gokishathachatnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathachatshﾃｫnﾃｼ|shathachatshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathachatnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshathachatnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathachatshﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishathachatshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathachatshﾃｫro|shathachatshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathachatnkshﾃｫro|goshathachatnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathachatshﾃｫro|gokishathachatshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathachatshﾃｫmu|shathachatshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathachatnkshﾃｫmu|goshathachatnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathachatshﾃｫmu|gokishathachatshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathachatronﾃｼ|shathachatronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathachatnkronﾃｼ|goshathachatnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathachatronﾃｼ|gokishathachatronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathachatroshﾃｫ|shathachatroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathachatnkroshﾃｫ|goshathachatnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathachatroshﾃｫ|gokishathachatroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathachatromu|shathachatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathachatnkromu|goshathachatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathachatromu|gokishathachatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathachatmunﾃｼ|shathachatmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathachatnkmunﾃｼ|goshathachatnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathachatmunﾃｼ|gokishathachatmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathachatmushﾃｫ|shathachatmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathachatnkmushﾃｫ|goshathachatnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathachatmushﾃｫ|gokishathachatmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathachatmuro|shathachatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathachatnkmuro|goshathachatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathachatmuro|gokishathachatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki active verbs]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
